calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Hsiao C. Mao, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 44 De Haro - VEF VI, LLC.
Gwillym Jones, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Avolent, Inc.
Amended default was entered against defendant on November 14, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 20, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 444 De Haro - VEF VI, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Avolent, Inc. as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $35,963.91.
Holdover Damages - $71,926.02.
Attorney's Fees - $22,109.00.
Costs - $604.00.
Less Forbearance Payment of $53,945.46, for a total judgment in the amount of $76,657.47.

Plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the subject property located at 444 De Haro Street, Floor 1, Suites 100B, 111, 117, 120B and 128, San Francisco, CA. The Rental Agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
